difficulty.reason: Frost-sensitive, needs consistent watering, but compact/trailing so no staking needed

growth_stages.name: Seedling
growth_stages.look_for: Small compact plant with tomato-scented leaves

prompt.en: This tomato TRAILS instead of growing tall! Smell the leaves -- same tomato smell!
prompt.da: Denne tomat HAENGER i stedet for at vokse hoeijt! Lugt bladene -- samme tomatlug!

growth_stages.name: Transplant & Trailing
growth_stages.look_for: Stems starting to trail over the edge of the bed or pot

prompt.en: This one doesn't grow up -- it grows DOWN! How far has it trailed over the edge?
prompt.da: Denne vokser ikke op -- den vokser NED! Hvor langt haenger den ud over kanten?

growth_stages.name: Flowering
growth_stages.look_for: Clusters of small yellow flowers along the trailing stems

prompt.en: Yellow flowers on the hanging stems! Each one becomes a tiny tomato!
prompt.da: Gule blomster paa de haengende stammer! Hver en bliver til en lille tomat!

growth_stages.name: Fruiting
growth_stages.look_for: Red cherry tomatoes dangling from trailing stems

prompt.en: The red ones hanging down are ready! Pick and eat -- like nature's gummy bears!
prompt.da: De roede, der haenger ned, er klar! Pluk og spis -- som naturens vingummi!

human_readable.en: Water deeply every 1-2 days. Keep consistently moist. Trailing habit dries out faster.
human_readable.da: Vand grundigt hver 1-2 dag. Hold jaevnt fugtig. Haengende vaekst toerrer hurtigere ud.

harvest.notes: Determinate trailing variety: compact, no staking. Fruits cascade over bed or pot edge. Red when ripe.

companion_plants.notes: Benefits from same companions as Sungold. Compact size means less crowding.

bed_notes: Backup pot overflow from Bed C; not assigned to any raised bed.

message.en: Tumbling Tom needs water -- trailing tomatoes dry out fast!
message.da: Tumbling Tom har brug for vand -- haengende tomater toerrer hurtigt ud!

message.en: FROST ALERT: Cover tomatoes NOW! They will die below 2C.
message.da: FROSTALARM: Daek tomaterne NU! De doer under 2 grader.
